name: insidedesk-tools
description: InsideDesk internal Claude plugins — ops, reporting, integrations, and shared auth.

plugins.name: id-claude-shared
plugins.description: Shared foundations — AWS login, OS-aware secret retrieval, secrets bundle import/export, skill logging. Every other InsideDesk plugin depends on this one.

plugins.name: id-claude-ops
plugins.description: Client ops — offboarding, install ticketing, communications, HubSpot workflows, Bitwerx/DataCo, sync status, and AWS auth.

plugins.name: id-claude-reporting
plugins.description: Reporting — 422 Tax ID report, PMS Out-of-Sync report, Power BI export, GoldenEye snapshot errors, install team summary, morning brief.

plugins.name: id-claude-integrations
plugins.description: Integrations — Kolla account management/health checks, DataCo SupportCo API, claim ticket verification, and AWS auth.

plugins.name: coding-quality
plugins.description: Claude-facing coding standards — universal clean-code, git, security, error-handling, testing, and documentation rules with MUST/SHOULD/MAY tiers, plus Python, Python on AWS (boto3), Terraform/AWS, AWS Lambda (Node.js), GitLab CI (OIDC trust-policy pinning), and web-frontend stack overlays, and pre-commit/pre-PR/new-project checklists.

plugins.name: opentofu-secure
plugins.description: Hardened AWS toolkit: a generator skill that scaffolds security-baked OpenTofu/Terraform config (S3, IAM/GitLab-OIDC, Route53/ACM, observability, VPC, Lambda, DynamoDB, state-bootstrap), and a report-only detective skill that audits a personal AWS account for cost anomalies, untagged resources, public-access/encryption drift, and idle/orphaned resources.
